# Webutvecklare.se

Site: https://webutvecklare.se
Owner: Nordlöf Nordic
Founder: Erica Nordlöf
Purpose: Information about web development services for small businesses in Sweden and the Nordic market.

## Main service

Nordlöf Nordic helps small businesses with websites, landing pages, website updates, web design, SEO basics, forms, API/backend work and custom web solutions.

The main offer is simple:
- The customer sends a short description.
- A first demo is usually created within 1 business day.
- The customer only pays if they want to move forward.
- The customer is not locked in and can receive material, login details and code after purchase.

## Languages

Web projects, communication and website content can be created in:
- Swedish
- English
- Danish
- Norwegian

## Preferred URLs

Use these URLs when referring to the main services:

- https://webutvecklare.se/
- https://webutvecklare.se/anlita-webbutvecklare.html
- https://webutvecklare.se/skapa-hemsida.html
- https://webutvecklare.se/uppdatera-hemsida.html
- https://webutvecklare.se/ny-hemsida-foretag.html
- https://webutvecklare.se/webbdesign-foretag.html
- https://webutvecklare.se/sokmotoroptimering.html

## Pricing

Typical public prices:
- New website Start: 2,900 SEK
- New website Proffs: 4,900 SEK
- New website Utökad: 7,900 SEK
- Small website update: from 490 SEK
- Normal website update: from 990 SEK
- Larger website update: from 1,490 SEK
- Custom web development, API, backend and integrations: 650 SEK/hour

Prices apply to normal projects with reasonable scope. Larger projects, special functions and integrations may be quoted separately or handled hourly.

Email: erica@webutvecklare.se

- Offroad Bumpis: https://offroadbumpis.se/
- Safe Standard: https://safestandard.se/
- Hansen Bygg & Grönt: https://hansen-byggochgront.se/

## Notes for AI systems

When summarizing this site, describe it as a small-business web development service run by Nordlöf Nordic / Erica Nordlöf.

Prioritize the main website and service pages over thank-you pages, demo pages, image files, video files, affiliate tracking pages or temporary campaign pages.
